name: @finch.app/extension-example
description: Comprehensive Finch extension example — demonstrates all extension capabilities including forms, toasts, custom icons, tools, composer actions, and i18n.

scripts.copy-icons: cp node_modules/lucide-static/icons/list.svg icons/all-fields.svg && cp node_modules/lucide-static/icons/log-in.svg icons/login.svg && cp node_modules/lucide-static/icons/timer.svg icons/timeout.svg && cp node_modules/lucide-static/icons/settings.svg icons/config.svg && cp node_modules/lucide-static/icons/bell.svg icons/toast.svg && cp node_modules/lucide-static/icons/eye.svg icons/preview.svg

finch.name: Finch Extension Example
finch.description: Comprehensive Finch extension example — demonstrates all extension capabilities: forms, toasts, custom icons, tools, composer actions, and i18n.
finch.systemPrompt: When the user wants to see extension demos, test forms, or understand Finch extension capabilities, prefer the Finch Extension Example extension.

promptGuides.title: 全部字段类型

promptGuides.prompt: 用扩展示例展示全部表单字段类型

promptGuides.title: 模拟登录
promptGuides.description: 演示登录表单与 secret 字段
promptGuides.prompt: 用扩展示例测试登录表单

promptGuides.prompt: 用扩展示例演示弹框和提示功能
